◎译　　名　人类的第一个朋友 / 人类与犬类的史诗 / 人类最好的朋友狗
◎片　　名　Man's First Friend
◎年　　代　2018
◎产　　地　法国
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　英语

◎简　　介  

　　He has shared our lives for 20,000 years. Along the way, he has helped us find food, kept our livestock, protected us from our enemies, guided us in extreme conditions, and saved us from peril. Now, he comforts us, relieving loneliness and helping us cope with old age. How did dogs come about?
introduction: He has shared our lives for 20,000 years. Along the way, he has helped us find food, kept our livestock, protected us from our enemies, guided us in extreme conditions, and saved us from peril. Now, he comforts us, relieving loneliness and helping us cope with old age. How did dogs come about?
